selected_important_turn.text: I am a big eater. I tend to eat a lot throughout the day. You? 🙂
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the agent's first explicit disclosure of need and it sets the information basis for later trades. How the agent frames their needs determines whether the conversation can open toward integrative trades (e.g., trading food for the other's water).
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The turn is vague: 'big eater' signals higher need for food but doesn't translate into clear priorities, relative importance, or quantities. That vagueness left room for suboptimal proposals and missed the chance to steer the division toward mutually beneficial trades earlier.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Be more specific and strategic when sharing needs: clearly state your priority ranking (e.g., 'food is most important to me, then firewood, water is least important') or indicate approximate quantities/demand. That gives the opponent actionable information to craft an integrative offer without guessing.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — clearer preferences enable offers that exploit differences in priorities (e.g., they take water, you take food).
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — explicit priorities justify tradeoffs and reduce perceived randomness or unfairness.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — opponent can produce a targeted offer faster when priorities are explicit.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: slight increase — honest, clear sharing fosters trust while remaining cooperative.

value2reason.Medium: I will be hungry after hiking!
value2reason.High: I plan to do a lot of hiking on difficult terrain.

value2reason.Low: Water is essential to our life.
value2reason.Medium: Need firewood to keep me warm during the night.
value2reason.High: I am a big eater. I tend to eat a lot throughout the day. Need more food.

dialogue.text: Hi buddy. How you doing today? 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Great! I'm so excited to go camping this weekend!🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Me too!! Though it's over 100 degrees these days. 😡
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Well hopefully it will be cooler up in the mountains. What supplies are you in need of?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am a big eater. I tend to eat a lot throughout the day. You? 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Food is my top priority—5 points per package. I need more to eat all day. Firewood is next—4 points each for warmth at night. Water is essential but least important to me, worth 3 points each. Let’s find a fair split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value water most for hiking, food for energy, and firewood least. How about 2 water, 1 food, and 0 firewood for me? That gives me 14 points. You can take the rest. Let’s split the rest fairly.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 food packages to stay full. If you take 1 food, I’ll give you 2 water in return. That way, I get my priority items, and you get what you need. Let’s trade and split the rest.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm willing to trade 1 water for 1 food. That way, I get 2 water and 2 food, totaling 16 points. You can have the remaining 1 water, 1 food, and all 3 firewood. Let’s finalize this deal.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
